{{Infobox concept
| name = General Teach's transformation
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] has undergone a physical transformation that includes having a canine tail.}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
